title: Modern Cobblestone
description: Allows for the 1.14+ Cobblestone & Mossy Cobblestone textures to be used with Programmer Art and older versions of Minecraft.
body:
### If you want something like this for the Furnace, feel free to check out: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-furnace

**In order to work with Programmer Art, please layer this resource pack above it otherwise the original textures will still be visible.**

This _extremely_ niche resource pack allows you to play older versions of Minecraft (or use the Programmer Art pack) with the current Cobblestone and Mossy Cobblestone textures created by Jappa. There isn't anything else to this, it's literally just the 1.14 cobble textures and that's it.

I created this for personal use as I much prefer the newer Cobblestone texture (and the fact that the new Mossy Cobblestone actually fits in with the Mossy Stone Bricks) but I figured there's at least _one_ person out there who might want a similar thing so I uploaded it (along with several backports) to Modrinth.

_**DISCALIMER:** I will not be porting or backporting this pack to any Snapshots or versions of Minecraft older than 1.6.1. However, you are more than welcome to do so yourself if you please._
